programme.title: Cheers Fouls Out

programme.desc: Cheers, S09E03, Sam tries to get Rebecca back at Cheers after she takes another job.

programme.title: Where Nobody Knows Your Name
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E04, Rebecca's miffed when Robin's ex tells the press that she's his true love.

programme.title: Ma Always Liked You Best
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E05, Woody lets Ma Clavin move into Woody's apartment, much to Cliff's chagrin.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E06, Norm fights to save his favorite hangout from getting demolished.

programme.title: Breaking In Is Hard To Do
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E07, Rebecca plans a surprise visit to her prison bound love, Robin.

programme.title: 200th Anniversary Show (Part 1)
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E08, In this very special celebration of "Cheers"' 200th show, Shelley Long rejoins the rest of the gang for a unique look back at the past eight years in part one of a two-part episode.

programme.title: 200th Anniversary Show (Part 2)
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E09, In this very special celebration of "Cheers"' 200th show, Shelley Long rejoins the rest of the gang for a unique look back at the past eight years in part two of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Bad Neighbor Sam
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E10, Sam loses his cool when a restaurateur takes over the poolroom and restrooms.

programme.title: Veggie-Boyd
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E11, Woody promotes a horrible vegetable drink on his first commercial appearance.

programme.title: Norm And Cliff's Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E12, Cliff and Norm's practical joking put Sam and Frasier at odds with each other.

programme.title: Woody Interruptus
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E13, Woody's gripped with fear of losing Kelly when she returns with a Frenchman.

programme.title: Honor Thy Mother
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E14, Carla resists her mother's dying wish of renaming her son Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Achilles Hill
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E15, Sam gets revenge on restaurateur John Allen Hill by dating his daughter.

programme.title: Days Of Wine And Neuroses
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E16, Rebecca reveals her true feelings about Sam when Robin proposes.

programme.title: Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E17, Sam tries to stop Rebecca's from marrying Robin after she confesses her feelings.

programme.title: I'm Getting My Act Together And Sticking It In Your Face
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E18, Sam inadvertently leaves a message on Rebecca's machine that he loves her.

programme.title: Sam Time Next Year
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E19, Sam injures his back while on his annual Valentine's Day date with his old flame.

programme.title: Crash Of The Titans
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E20, Sam and Rebecca try to buy the bar's poolroom and restrooms from John Allen Hill. In the end, Rebecca pays for the majority of the cost, in exchange for part ownership of Cheers.

programme.title: It's A Wonderful Wife
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E21, Norm's wife takes a job at the restaurant above Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers Has Chili
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E22, Woody increases traffic at Cheers by selling his famous chili.

programme.title: Carla Loves Clavin
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E23, Cliff poses as a judge in the Miss Barmaid contest to win Carla's favor.

programme.title: Pitch It Again, Sam
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E24, Sam plans to strike out an old baseball rival at a charity game.

programme.title: Rat Girl

programme.title: Home Malone
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E26, Sam locks himself out of the house while babysitting for Lilith and Frasier's son.

programme.title: Uncle Sam Wants You
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E27, Sam embarks on a search for a suitable mother to have his baby.

programme.title: Baby Balk
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E01, Sam and Rebecca seek psychiatric help for getting in the mood.

programme.title: Get Your Kicks On Route 666
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E02, The guys of Cheers get stranded when they take a road trip on Route 66.

programme.title: Madame LaCarla
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E03, Carla's psychic asks her to take over her spiritual reading business.

programme.title: The Norm Who Came To Dinner
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E04, Norm stays at Lilith and Fraiser's house while recovering from an injury.

programme.title: Ma's Little Maggie
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E05, Cliff's mom wants him to get married when she meets his girlfriend.

programme.title: Unplanned Parenthood
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E06, Woody hires an actress to pose as Kelly in a home video to his parents.

programme.title: Bar Wars V: The Final Judgement
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E07, Sam's convinced that the death of his rival is jus a silly one of his pranks.

programme.title: Where Have All The Floorboards Gone?
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E08, Cliff's brainteaser could prove to be undoing of Kevin McHale.

programme.title: Head Over Hill
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E09, Cliff's taken for a wild horse ride when he participates in a commemoration.

In the Shadow of the Moon, 20070101080000 +0000, Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: Episode 4: Black Holes
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 4: Black Holes, S01E04, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 3: Asteroids
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 3: Asteroids, S01E03, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 6: Fermi paradox
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 6: Fermi paradox, S01E06, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 5: Space Missions
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 5: Space Missions, S01E05, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 2: Moons
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 2: Moons, S01E02, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 7: The Milky Way
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 7: The Milky Way, S01E07, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 8: Extravehicular Activity
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 8: Extravehicular Activity, S01E08, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 1: The Solar System
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 1: The Solar System, S01E01, This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see, how we can live in space and what science tells us about the past and the future as we journey inside out of space.

Moon Shots: Inside the Lost Apollo Archive, 20160101080000 +0000, The world famous Apollo missions are some of the greatest feats ever accomplished by man. With rare archive footage and unprecedented access to life on board the Apollo spacecrafts, this stunning one-hour special brings scientific history to life.
Neil Armstrong: One Small Step, 20150720000000 +0000, Neil Armstrong has stamped his place in history by becoming the first person to walk on the moon.

programme.title: Part 1
programme.desc: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 1, S01E01, Between 1960 and 1972, mankind boldly went where no human had been before. Across 11 manned missions, 24 men flew to the moon and 12 walked upon its surface. This film documents Apollo 17 through the eyes of the astronauts who flew.

programme.title: Part 2
programme.desc: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 2, S01E02, In this episode, hear first hand testimonials and dialogue from the incredible men who walked on the moon. Incredible footage and photos give a unique and beautiful experience of their data collection process and journey home.

programme.title: Universe or Multiverse?
programme.desc: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Universe or Multiverse?, S01E04, Cutting-edge theories are suggesting that our universe may not be the only universe. Instead, it may be just one of an infinite number of worlds that make up the multiverse.

programme.title: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Quantum Leap, S01E03, Join Brian Greene on a wild ride into the weird realm of quantum physics, which governs the universe on the tiniest of scales.

programme.title: What Is Space?
programme.desc: The Fabric of the Cosmos: What Is Space?, S01E01, Brian Greene reveals space as a dynamic fabric that can stretch, twist, warp, and ripple under the influence of gravity, and explores dark energy, which makes up 70% of the universe.

programme.title: The Illusion of Time
programme.desc: The Fabric of the Cosmos: The Illusion of Time, S01E02, Brian Greene takes us on the ultimate time traveling adventure, hurtling 50 years into the future before stepping into a wormhole to travel back to Big Bang.

programme.title: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond, S03E05, The Cassini space craft has completed its mission over Saturn, Juno has reached its target and has commenced its scientific observations of the giant planet Jupiter.

programme.title: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds, S01E03, They orbit between us and our Star, the inner worlds; hidden within the sun's glare often only visible at sunrise or sunset.

EARTH´S EVIL TWIN, S05E04, Venus is a planet closest to Earth in distance and size, it once may have been as hospitable to life as Earth is now. Then something changed and Venus became shrouded in hot dense toxic clouds.

programme.title: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS
programme.desc: The New Frontier: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS, S05E10, Projects in the works. SunRISE, SPHEREx, NEOS and others, their mission to expand our knowledge of Earth, the surrounding space, Dark Matter, and the earliest galaxies. N

programme.title: WEBB OF LIFE
programme.desc: The New Frontier: WEBB OF LIFE, S05E08, The James Webb Space Telescope is now operational. Launched aboard an Arianne 5 the 10-billion-dollar spacecraft has deployed successfully and reached its orbit around the Sun.

programme.title: The Dark Side
programme.desc: The New Frontier: The Dark Side, S02E10, Perhaps that American politician was right. There are indeed things we know we don’t know.

programme.title: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers, S01E05, From the beginnings of our Solar System four and half billion years ago there remains tantalizing clues to its evolution; remnent debris: asteroids and comets.

programme.title: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars, S01E04, It has fired our imaginations for millennia, Mars, the God of War and the source of Man's science fictional demise.

programme.title: Hyabusa
programme.desc: The New Frontier: Hyabusa, S04E05, The Japanese Asteroid sample return mission has reached its target and is surveying the space rock ready to dip down and take a sample.

programme.title: Bad Attitude; Strapped
programme.desc: The First 48, 20260223015800 +0000, A stabbing victim is found in a Dallas apartment, and police suspect a woman lured the man to his death; club night in Miami turns deadly for an unarmed teen.

programme.title: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: The First 48, 20260223025700 +0000, A New Orleans woman and her 4-year-old grandson are shot in her bedroom; the crime is investigated as the child struggles to survive.

programme.title: Cold Betrayal
programme.desc: The First 48, 20260223035700 +0000, When a man is shot in front of his family in their home shortly before Christmas, detectives investigate drug dealers.

programme.title: Mick Philpott
programme.desc: World's Most Evil Killers, S02E03, In 2012, fame-hungry Mick Philpott killed six of his own children by setting fire to the family home as they slept upstairs.

programme.title: Raoul Moat
programme.desc: World's Most Evil Killers, S02E04, In 2010, bodybuilder Raoul Moat shot his ex-girlfriend and her partner, and went on the run and declared war on Northumbria police, vowing not to stop killing officers until he was dead.

programme.title: Stephen Griffiths
programme.desc: World's Most Evil Killers, S01E07, Stephen Griffiths, the self-proclaimed Crossbow Cannibal, had always fantasized about murder. In 2009, he acted on his murderous instincts and killed three women.

programme.title: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: World's Most Evil Killers, S01E10, It is widely believed that Tobin is the 1960s Scottish serial killer known as Bible John.

programme.title: Double Cross Killer
programme.desc: Fatal Crimes, S01E01, Newlyweds Katie and JD have ever-escalating tension with JD's ex-wife Robin. When Robin is found shot to death, in an apparent robbery gone wrong, police arrest the killer. Or...do they?

programme.title: House of Lies
programme.desc: Fatal Crimes, S01E02, Keith Gentry is shot in his sleep in the middle of the night, and left to be found by his wife, Darlene.

programme.title: Monday Night Murder
programme.desc: Fatal Crimes, S01E03, When a man's family and co-workers lose touch with him and can't find any trace of him for days, the police are sent to his apartment to investigate and see what they can figure it out.

programme.title: Murder in the Desert
programme.desc: Fatal Crimes, S01E05, On an unusually warm September morning beloved yoga instructor Michael Dojaquez is found shot dead on his front porch.

programme.title: Wendi Davidson
programme.desc: Killer Mysteries, S01E46, The disappearance of a decorated military man stumps law enforcement and shocks a central Texas community.

programme.title: A Treacherous Triangle
programme.desc: Killer Mysteries, S01E54, Two prominent doctors that are two towns apart are entangled in a passionate rivalry for the same woman's affections.

programme.title: The Devil Next Door
programme.desc: Killer Mysteries, S01E62, A look at a woman who was murdered inside her rural Louisiana home.

programme.title: Spoiled, Rotten, & Ruthless
programme.desc: Killer Mysteries, S01E70, A look at three members of an affluent family who are mowed down inside their home.

programme.title: The Talking Dead
programme.desc: Bizarre Murders, S01E43, Claiming to be possessed by the spinster spirit of a murdered woman she barely knew, a New Orleans nurse leads cops straight to the killer.

programme.title: Answered Prayers
programme.desc: Bizarre Murders, S01E48, When a doomsday survivalist is shot dead in his bunker, his daughter and son-in-law incriminate themselves with a story about masked intruders and the power of prayer.

programme.title: Mistaken Identity
programme.desc: Bizarre Murders, S01E01, A man hires a killer to bump off his wife, but instead, he kills another woman with the exact same name.

programme.title: Grifting Grannies
programme.desc: Bizarre Murders, S01E33, Investigators suspect two grannies are behind a twisted insurance scam, but they have to find the evidence that ties them to a hit-and-run.

programme.title: Oh, Deer
programme.desc: Bizarre Murders, S01E38, When her husband threatens her with divorce, an Arkansas hunter sets the scene for a tragic accident that's actually a murder.

programme.title: Good Brother
programme.desc: Crime Stoppers: Case Files, S06E09, Miami. May 26, 2008, 29-year old Armando Contino was killed in a parking lot outside a motel. June 29, 2010, Rico Thomas' body was found deceased in an open field. September 8, 2011, Christopher Headley was found shot dead in the parking lot.

programme.title: "My Son…Please"
programme.desc: Crime Stoppers: Case Files, S06E14, Miami. September 16, 2011, Willie Latson and Devon Broughton were gunned down. November 27, 2011, Terry Brown was shot while socializing with friends. July 22, 2010, Dharmaniyah Moore was shot and lies in bed with severe brain damage.

programme.title: Fighter Falls --Emmy Winner
programme.desc: Crime Stoppers: Case Files, S01E06, Emmy Winner. Ohio. June 25, 2008 Anthony Waters was visiting his mother, but was stopped by a group of teenagers who killed him. February 4, 2002, longtime anti-crime activist, Frances Jones, was murdered in her driveway after returning home from work.

programme.title: Bullet On A String
programme.desc: Targeted For Murder, S01E12, Friends and family are bewildered when ex-cop and private investigator Taylor Wright disappears without a trace.

programme.title: Misery In Missouri
programme.desc: Targeted For Murder, S01E17, After a Midwestern insurance salesman is discovered on the floor of his office with an extra hole in his head, his wife, family, community, and church are drawn into a web of greed, infidelity, and murder.

programme.title: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: 24 Hours in Police Custody, S02E06, A string of knifepoint robberies have led the Robbery Squad to two suspects.

programme.title: Love Thy Neighbour
programme.desc: 24 Hours in Police Custody, S03E03, Tommy Robinson, the founder of English Defence League, is held in Luton Police Station.

programme.title: The Trouble With Tribbles

programme.title: Traces Of Murder/The Bathtub Killer
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S01E09, A killer helps convict himself when he boasts about his crime to prison cellmates; and New Hampshire investigators probing the murder of a pregnant woman found raped, strangled, and dumped into her bathtub, get a new lead.

programme.title: The Voice In The Lake
programme.desc: Cold Case Files, S02E01, When 31-year-old real estate appraiser Mike Williams mysteriously vanishes while duck hunting in the Florida swamps in December of 2000, authorities suspect he accidentally drowned. For sixteen years his disappearance remains a mystery.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classics
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S04E21, A North Carolina man looking to clear his conscience gives police the information they need to solve a murder. And Indiana police are baffled by the murder of an 86-year-old woman, found dead in her bedroom.

programme.title: Bump In The Night/Hitchhike To Murder
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S03E24, A woman who takes down the license plate number of a car that had been following her helps police solve the murder of another young woman.

programme.title: The Burning Secret/Justice Delayed
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S01E12, A detective keeps a murder investigation going for 16 years and finally proves a woman killed her husband in a satanic rite; THE BURNING SECRET: and a rape victim fails to get a conviction on her attacker.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classics
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S02E10, Klan leader Sam Bowers goes on trial for ordering the murder of an African-American storeowner 32 years prior, and investigators reopen the unsolved case of an African-American truck driver who was forced to leap to his death from a bridge by Klan member

programme.title: The Original Nightstalker
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S03E05, In the 1980s, a serial killer prowled the posh streets of Orange County. Police were unaware of the serial attacks until 1996, when DNA revealed the killer's secret and they linked four murders to a single DNA profile.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classics
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S05E21, Detectives are baffled when two young girls are raped, murdered, and dumped in an abandoned house in Akron, Ohio. And a 26-year-old mother of three disappears on Christmas Eve in 1995, but the missing person case goes cold when police can find few clues

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classics
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S04E18, A forensic scientist's painstaking examination of a rape kit helps solve the 15-year-old murder of a teenage girl. And when California investigators probe the murder of a 71-year-old man, they get help from the top suspect's former therapist.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classics
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S02E15, Fire investigator Jack Malooly helps crack the case of an arsonist and killer who set fires to collect insurance money, and a prison inmate tells a detective that he can't help him with his current investigation, but knows about a 15-year-old murder.

programme.title: Left for Dead / On the Case (#126)
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S05E25, A detective in California tracks down a prostitute's killer with the help of a key piece of evidence. And two persistent cold case detectives use DNA to investigate the 1990 murder of a woman and the death of a man killed in a car crash in 1988.

programme.title: Love and Hate
programme.desc: Cold Case Files, S02E07, Near what's known as the hanging tree, the mutilated body of Timothy Coggins is found in late 1983. The investigation is thwarted and the case freezes for over 30 years, until a newly elected sheriff vows to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Green River Killer/Missing And The Dead
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S03E13, In 1982 and '83, Seattle's Green River Killer stalked prostitutes like game. With 49 victims, he could be the deadliest serial killer in U.S. history. Then, a passing motorist spots a fire along a road in South Carolina and calls it in.

programme.title: The Cuff Link/The Unluckiest Man
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S02E11, Police solve an old murder case with a painstaking examination of the tool mark on the plastic flex cuff that bound the victim's hands, and a 15-year-old murder case is finally cracked open.

programme.title: The Sunday Morning Slasher
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S05E11, Law enforcement officials fear they may have to release a serial killer from prison until a 24-year-old murder case gives them a chance to lock him up for good.

programme.title: Lone Survivor
programme.desc: Cold Case Files, S02E27, In early 1984, three-year-old Vanessa Bennett becomes the lone survivor of her family's brutal murder. Initial investigators suspect a serial killer is at large, but decades pass before DNA narrows the suspect pool to one man.

programme.title: Killer On The Strip/The Doll Murder
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S01E11, In 1989, socialite Susan Doll was found beaten, raped, and strangled in Colorado.
MST3K: Gamera vs. Jiger, 20220722000000 +0000, Jonah's crew watch Gamera save the day at Osaka's Expo '70, in GAMERA VS JIGER (1970). Pearl tries to convince Kinga to take a break.

MST3K: Gamera Vs. Zigra, 19911019000000 +0000, The seventh offering from Gamera: the infamous turtle faces off against an alien called Zigra determined on world domination. Joel and the Bots build a scale model of Gamera and make shoebox dioramas.

programme.title: Star Force: Fugitive Alien II
programme.desc: Mystery Science Theater 3000, S03E18, Ken and the crew of the Bacchus 3 return in Star Force: Fugitive Alien II (1987) while Joel and the Bots make a Captain Joe action figure and stage a "name that puppet" quiz show.

programme.title: Are You Ready for Marriage?
programme.desc: MST3K Shorts, S01E02, A high school senior named Sue and her boyfriend want to get married right after Sue graduates. A marriage counselor discourages the young couple from entering into a hasty marriage.

MST3K: Colossus And The Headhunters, 19940820000000 +0000, Mike and the Bots try to make sense of Colossus and the Headhunters (1963) in which a man tries to lead his people from a destroyed island to someplace safe. Dr. Forester creates the world's cutest pet. Mike and the Bots are forced to take care of it.

programme.title: Alphabet Antics
programme.desc: MST3K Shorts, S01E01, A charming rhyme for children that teaches them the alphabet, including many now politically-incorrect things, dangerous sequences, and some plagiarism.

programme.title: A Case of Spring Fever & The Chicken of Tomorrow
programme.desc: MST3K Shorts: A Case of Spring Fever & The Chicken of Tomorrow, S01E03, An animated pixie named Coily grants a man his wish that all springs disappear...a wish that he soon regrets.

programme.title: Manos: The Hands of Fate
programme.desc: Mystery Science Theater 3000, S01E30, A hapless family on a car trip in rural Texas takes refuge at a lodge that is secretly the home of a deadly cult.

programme.title: The Home Economics Story
programme.desc: MST3K Shorts, S01E05, Kay wants to go to Iowa State College and major in home economics. She and her friends have a great time in school and learn about the diverse careers that a degree in Home Economics can lead to.

programme.title: Last Clear Chance
programme.desc: MST3K Shorts, S01E06, Friendly Patrolman Hal Jackson visits the Dixon family to instruct their youngest son, Alan, in the art of safe and courteous driving.

programme.title: Marriage & Spring Fever
programme.desc: MST3K Shorts, S01E09, A charming rhyme for children that teaches them the alphabet, including many now politically-incorrect things, dangerous sequences, and some plagiarism. In the second episode, an animated pixie named Coily grants a man his wish that all springs disappear.

programme.title: Tormented
programme.desc: Mystery Science Theater 3000, S04E14, In Tormented, jazz pianist Tom Stewart, soon to marry the woman he loves, watches former love Vi Mason fall from a lighthouse and does not save her.

programme.title: The Beatniks
programme.desc: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Beatniks, S04E15, When a hold-up carried out by his hoodlum friends goes tragically awry, Eddie Crane’s bright future as a recording artist could be in jeopardy.

programme.title: How to Make a Middleton Quilt
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260223014603 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Cassie and Sam learn even more about each other.

programme.title: Tossing the Bouquet
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260223023518 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Abigail's quest to put down roots lands her a new job-- the Mayor of Middleton.
Away & Back, 20260223032733 +0000, Hallmark Hall of Fame. Jack, a widowed father of three young children, meets Ginny.
William Faulkner's Old Man, 20260223052145 +0000, Hallmark Hall of Fame. A prison inmate is tempted to escape during a Mississippi flood.
The Russell Girl, 20260223071357 +0000, Hallmark Hall of Fame. Sarah Russell decides to return home and try to heal old wounds.
Color My World with Love, 20260223090425 +0000, Hallmark Original Movie. Emma's daughter, who has Down Syndrome, is in a new romance Emma must navigate.

programme.title: A Budding Romance
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260223104445 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. The whole town anxiously awaits the impending blooming of the Middleton.

programme.title: Without Magic for a Spell
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260223113405 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. The Middleton Merriwick is still not in bloom.

programme.title: Day After Day
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260223122335 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Two guests arrive at Grey House and are immediately at odds.

programme.title: How to Say 'I Love You!'
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260223131305 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. The town is caught up in romance when Cassie helps Ben find an old film.

programme.title: A Birthday Wish
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260223140235 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. When a visiting chef is unable to relax, Cassie arranges for a day at the stove.

programme.title: Say It with Candy
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260223145205 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Abigail, jealous of Cassie's attention, decides to sell "special" chocolates.

programme.title: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260223154405 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Cassie gives a withdrawn traveling artist a new paintbrush.

programme.title: Somewhat Surprising
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260223163335 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Cassie decides to plan a surprise party for Sam.

programme.title: Not Getting Married Today, Part 1
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260223172305 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Cassie discovers a 10-year-old girl playing in the bushes at Grey House.

programme.title: Exodus
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1, S04E22, SG-1 joins forces with the Tok'ra in a final attempt to rid the universe of their mutual Goa'uld nemesis, Apophis. But their plan goes awry when a member of the team is captured and they find themselves at the mercy of their most feared enemy!

programme.title: Enemies
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1, S05E01, Presumed dead, Teal'c (Christopher Judge) is discovered very much alive…but still under the control of the evil Apophis (Peter Williams). Will the SG-1 team be able to rescue their friend from the clutches of Apophis or will they die trying?

programme.title: Threshold
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1, S05E02, While Teal’c’s body has been saved from death on Apophis’ ship, his mind is still loyal to his Goa’uld lord. Jaffa Master Bra’tac suggests an ancient ritual to restore Teal'c's mind...a ritual fraught with danger and one which no one has survived.

programme.title: Ascension
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1, S05E03, While investigating an alien device Carter is found unconscious. Resting from suspected exhaustion, she is visited by an invisible being who holds vital secrets to the device and more. But how does she convince SG-1 that she is not delusional?

programme.title: The Fifth Man
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1, S05E04, When the SG-1 team reports in from a brutal mission, they discover that their fifth team member -- Lt. Tyler -- may not actually have been real. Does this mean the end of the Stargate Program? If the Pentagon's Col. Simmons has his way, it will.

programme.title: Letters From Pegasus
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S01E17, McKay discovers a way for the team to send messages to Earth, allowing the team to send messages to their loved ones as the Wraith approach the city. Sheppard and Teyla leave Atlantis in the hopes of gathering information about the Wraith army.

programme.title: The Gift
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S01E18, Plagued by terrifying nightmares, Teyla (Rachel Luttrell) begins to recall a time when she and her father were captured by the Wraith and subjected to disturbing experiments. With the help of an old Athosian woman, Teyla looks deep into her past.

programme.title: The Siege (Part 1)
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S01E19, With a group of Wraith hive ships on the way to Atlantis, the team searches for a place to flee and a way to destroy the city. McKay (David Hewlett) leads a team to try and activate the Ancients' orbital weapons platform to destroy the Wraith.

programme.title: The Siege (Part 2)
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S01E20, Just as the team is beginning to lose hope, Col. Everett is sent from the Stargate Program on Earth. As Everett and the team strategize, a new battleship, the Daedalus, arrives with a new Zero Point Module, bringing with it new hope.

programme.title: The Siege (Part 3)
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S02E01, The team is saved with the arrival of Colonel Steven Caldwell, the Daedalus, and the destruction of the two approaching Wraith ships. McKay hopes the Zero Point Module will be the key to their success, meanwhile Ford seems off after an accident.

programme.title: Intruder
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S02E02, Sheppard starts to question things when strange malfunctions begin to occur after the team returns from a trip to Earth. The team discovers that the Daedalus has been infected with a Wraith Virus, causing the ship to go into survival mode.

programme.title: Runner
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S02E03, The search for Lt. Ford leads Sheppard and Teyla to planet P3M-736 where they are captured by Ronon Dex, a man who is on the run, being hunted by the Wraith. The team offer to help Ronon, going up against the Wraith once again.

programme.title: Duet
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S02E04, While on Planet Thenora, the team is shocked when McKay and marine officer Laura Cadman are suddenly taken aboard a Wraith Dart. When the team shoots down the Dart, they discover a technical glitch has put Cadman's consciousness in McKay's body.

programme.title: Condemned
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S02E05, The team discover a planet that has cruel punishments for anyone who commits a crime; they are placed near the Stargate to be taken by the Wraith. This proves to be too effective forcing the society to put innocent folk in jail to please the Wraith.

programme.title: Trinity
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S02E06, The team discover the remains of an experiment the Ancients were working on to create the ultimate power generator and McKay believes he can finish what the Ancients started. Teyla and Ronon discover Ronon is not the last of his kind.

programme.title: Instinct
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S02E07, Beckett begins experimenting with a new treatment that could turn the Wraiths into humans. The team finds a young Wraith girl, who could be Beckett's first patient. Having been raised by a human, the girl is eager, and reckless, to try anything.

programme.title: Conversion
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S02E08, After being injected with Beckett's Wraith treatment, Sheppard's life is in danger as he slowly is transforming into an Iratus bug hybrid. The team rushes to find a cure and reverse the side effects, but in the end it might be up to Sheppard.

programme.title: Agony
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S09E25, Kelly receives medical treatment and files a police report. Matt helps a thief gain his release through a technicality. Although Dylan warns that she is still fragile, David asks Gina on a date.

programme.title: The Phantom Menace
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E01, Kelly is arrested and held overnight until the shooting is ruled a justifiable homicide. David asks Dylan to move out. Wayne annoys Donna with his cavalier attitude, particularly when he fails to show sensitivity toward Kelly.

programme.title: A Fine Mess
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E04, Steve buys an engagement ring and practices proposals, often with Noah assuming the role of Janet. Dylan grows tired of living with Gina and suggests that she find her own place. David's radio show becomes popular due to his abrasive tactics.

programme.title: The Loo-Ouch
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E05, Steve and Janet announce the pregnancy and engagement to her parents, who respond by calling Janet a disgrace. Matt and Noah each offer to move out so that Steve can move Janet and the baby into the house.

programme.title: 80's Night
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E06, David's radio persona gets flack-and ratings; Matt tries to overturn a death sentence for a rapist-murderer; the after-hours club attracts the wrong attention; Steve haunts the house.

programme.title: Baby, You Can Drive My Car
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E08, Janet begins to panic about wedding preparations. Steve suggests that they organize a scavenger hunt for their friends, with clues providing the location of a party. Gina freaks out when Dylan refuses to pull over and help a stray dog.

programme.title: Family Tree
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E09, Steve and Janet endure various calamaties on their honeymoon. Just as they are beginning to have a good time, Janet goes into labor. Jackie seeks full custody of Erin, and David and Kelly try to keep their sister's spirits up.

programme.title: Nine Yolks Whipped Lightly
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E12, Gina's meeting with her father is unsatisfying, similar to Janet and her parents; Donna can't let go of Noah's accident; Dylan loses control in front of kids, and has second thoughts about Kelly, but is too late.

programme.title: I'm Using You 'Cause I Like You
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E14, Donna and David meet promising new mates; Kelly decides to quit the store; Matt violates his suspension; Dylan suffers from fast-lane acquaintances; the Sanders' hire a nanny.

programme.title: The Final Proof
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E16, Dylan accedes to Shane's demands for Noah; Kelly and Matt prepare to go on a couples game show; Dr. Martin tries to bond with Gina.

programme.title: Eddie Waitkus
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E18, A news report shows a live dead-ringer for Dylan's late father; Noah intrudes on Donna's meeting someone new; Kelly compromises her personal feelings for her profession; David gets the wrong idea when he overhears Camille talking with friends.

programme.title: Ever Heard the One About the Exploding Father?
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E20, Dylan's father makes him an offer; Steve lobbies for Ryan's return to college; David interviews for a job in New York; Matt represents a stand-up comic fired for not being funny.

programme.title: The Easter Bunny
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E22, Kelly grows suspicious of Matt's distant behavior. Camille tries to convince Donna to sell her clothing online. Steve and Janet fear that her parents' dog is to blame for the death of their snooty neighbors' pet rabbit.

programme.title: And Don't Forget to Give Me Back My Black T-Shirt
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E23, Mitch annoys Donna by trying to plan their entire relationship via an electronic organizer. Janet nixes Steve's plans to invest in Donna's site because of their limited finances.

programme.title: Love Is Blind
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E24, Dylan's generous wedding gift vexes Kelly and Matt, who consider moving to Seattle; an offer for their tabloid separates the Sanders' professionally; Noah meets Ellen's family; Donna's mother sells her house.

programme.title: The Penultimate
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E26, David expresses his feelings for Donna by writing her a giant love note in the sand. Dylan graduates from California University. Matt considers moving to New York to help his sister-in-law raise her child.

programme.title: Ode to Joy
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S10E27, After 10 years, the friends of 90210 say goodbye with a wedding, a reunion, and a few surprises! Just as Donna and David are joining together, Kelly's life is falling apart. Meanwhile, Steve and Janet make some major decisions about their future.

My Husband's Worst Mistake, 20260223004400 +0000, Brad Collins' love for his wife, Amy, becomes an all-encompassing obsession, and he grows more and more controlling of her with each passing year. When Brad finds out that Amy had an affair with a colleague, a huge fight ensues and tragedy results.
My Husband Is Missing, 20260223022600 +0000, A woman and her daughter try to help the police investigate the kidnapping of her husband.

Beyond the Headlines: The College Admissions Scandal With Gretchen Carlson, 20260223040800 +0000, Celebrities and prominent individuals cheat the system and illicitly pay for their children's admission to the nation's most prestigious universities with the help of William "Rick" Singer, the mastermind behind the scam.
Bury the Past, 20260223050000 +0000, The past comes back to haunt a woman in hiding who killed her abusive husband in self-defense.
My Nightmare Office Affair, 20260223064200 +0000, When Nick tries to break things off with Lisa, he finds himself in a dangerous game that threatens his job, his family and his life.

Newlywed and Dead, 20260223082500 +0000, A young newlywed begins to doubt her husband's love when his rival is found dead. When she starts investigating the death and her husband's past, she becomes his next target.

Beyond the Headlines: The Elizabeth Thomas Story With Elizabeth Smart, 20260223100800 +0000, Five years after being groomed and abducted by a teacher, Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal with kidnapping survivor Elizabeth Smart.
